scripts-descriptions.test: Run the default test suite (free + pro combo when Pro is present).
scripts-descriptions.test:free: Run free plugin in isolation — Pro is not loaded even if checked out.
scripts-descriptions.test:combo: Run the full testsuite with Pro loaded (tests/unit + tests/pro).
scripts-descriptions.test:pro: Run only tests/pro/* — requires Pro to be loaded.
scripts-descriptions.test:unit: Run only tests/unit/* without skipping Pro.
scripts-descriptions.test:usability: Run browser-level usability tests (Playwright) against the running WP install.
scripts-descriptions.test:usability:headed: Run usability tests in headed mode so you can watch the browser drive itself.
scripts-descriptions.test:usability:basecamp: Run only the previously-fixed Basecamp bug flows — fastest signal that fixes are locked in.
